'''Kandar''' was the [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] pilot and [[Astrogation/Legends|astrogator]] of the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Urias Xhaxin]]'s [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Free Lance]]''.

{{Char-stub}}
